calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Scheduling Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Jonathan Neil & Associates, Inc., A California Corporation,
No appearance by defaulted defendants Scotia Pacific International Inc., Alton Anderson Lomas Jr. aka Alton Anderson Lomas AKA A. Anderson Lomas aka Andy Lomas aka Alton A. Lomas, an individual.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $149,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $25,194.85
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $575.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $178,094.85

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
